resources.string: A slim handle at the screen edge opens a small app launcher over DJI Fly.
Show the handle and keep it running.
Needed to draw the handle on top of DJI Fly.
Granted. Tap to review the setting.
Could not open the settings screen. Grant \"Display over other apps\" for EdgeHatch manually.

Bring the handle back after a restart. This applies to the overlay-permission mode. In accessibility mode the handle already returns automatically while the service stays enabled, so this switch has no extra effect there.
Exempt EdgeHatch from battery optimization so the handle survives reboots and backgrounding. Select EdgeHatch, then \"Don\'t optimize\".
Could not open battery settings. Exempt EdgeHatch from battery optimization manually.

High-privilege compatibility mode — NOT a disability aid. Draws the EdgeHatch edge handle over other apps on locked devices where \"display over other apps\" cannot be granted (e.g. the DJI RC 2). It hosts only the overlay: it does not read screen content, inspect events, or perform gestures.
Overlay-host compatibility mode; draws the handle without the overlay permission.

A high-privilege compatibility mode for locked devices: if \"Display over other apps\" cannot be granted, enable EdgeHatch under Accessibility instead. It only hosts the handle (no screen reading). While enabled it also survives reboots on its own.
Enabled. Tap to review the setting.
Could not open accessibility settings. Enable EdgeHatch under Accessibility manually.
Choose which apps appear when you open the handle.
No apps selected yet. Pick apps in EdgeHatch.
Tap the edge handle to open your apps.
